name: Black Bean and Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and sort the beans, then drain well.
2. Place the beans and water in a large kettle and bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Cover and reduce heat; simmer until the beans absorb most of the water, about 30 to 45 minutes.
4. Add the stock and continue simmering, covered, until the beans are tender.
5. Stir in the olive oil, cumin, oregano, and salt.
6. Mix in the cooked brown rice, red wine vinegar, and sour cream.
7. Garnish with thinly sliced radishes, green onions, and lime wedges before serving.
